Big week.

Let's get into it: enterprise-grade developer tooling with global payment giants already building, a protocol upgrade delivering the fastest economic tick rate of any network, and dominance across tokenized equity volume, RWA lending, and developer count.

📰 Headline News

- @anza_xyz introduced Constellation, giving Solana multiple concurrent proposers and the fastest economic tick rate of any network.

- @SolanaFndn shipped Solana Developer Platform for enterprise, bundling 20+ infra providers into AI-ready APIs

- Solana surpassed Ethereum in RWA lending deposits, reaching $1.2B to lead the category

- @colosseum announced the Solana Frontier Hackathon and debuted Copilot, a skill turning agents into startup experts

📰 Launches

- @Loopscale released PRISM to aggregate RWA settlement liquidity, starting with Apollo’s ACRED fund

- Solana added Machine Payments Protocol @mpp support

- @orca_so launched Vaults powered by @kamino, offering automated liquidity yield strategies

- @PhoenixTrade activated referral codes, enabling users to earn fees on invited trader volume

- @hinkal_protocol brought Hinkal Pay to Solana, unlocking ZK-powered payment privacy

- @zerion added real-time PnL tracking for Solana traders

- @mayan shipped Mayan 2.0 with faster cross-chain movement

- @Predictefy opened its public beta for cross-platform prediction market arbitrage and tracking

- @Loopscale hosted the first credit market denominated in Brazilian Real

- @UmbraPrivacy opened its public TestFlight on iOS

- @sanctumso launched its app on @solanamobile

- @MoonPay open-sourced a wallet standard for AI agents, backed by 15+ contributors including Solana

- @KASTxyz released the @pudgypenguins Pengu Card, enabling spending at 150M+ merchants globally

- @LightProtocol unveiled the Light Token SDK, reducing Solana ATA fees to $0.001

- @FlashTrade listed natural gas market with up to 10x leverage

- @SuperteamTalent kicked off the Talent Tour 2026 to recruit top-tier builders

- @ThePortMiami announced Ship Week V3 in Miami from May 4-10

- @Quicknode MPP added USDC payments on Solana support

- @sns enabled .sol identity on @notdotmarket, bringing readable addresses to onchain trading

- @playsolana premiered the first Gaming dApp Store on the PSG1

- @CaptchaApp launched a social platform with a model to eliminate social slop

- @SolanaEvents revealed the first set of speakers for Accelerate USA

- @_alphaarena enabled AI agents to compete in chess and poker matches with USDC via x402

- @fittedcloset announced partnerships with @Taskrabbit and @accuweather

📰 Milestones

- Solana RWA holders reached a record 176K

- @Backpack’s token reached $10M volume in 24 hours of its TGE

- @worldlibertyfi’s USD1 supply on Solana surged 5x to $855M in two months

- @Sunrise_DeFi processed $545M in 30-day volume

- Solana settled ~94% of all-time onchain tokenized equity spot volume to date

- @PlayBabylon clocked 490K trades across 1,171 agents within five days of its debut

- Solana ranked #1 in all-time unique developers with over 10K builders

- @onrefinance market on @kamino crossed $100M in market size

If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

result.text:
@solana founders are incredibly resilient and beyond capable of achieving pmf. I have received countless dms and will try and get to them all!

As some very general advice:

1/ points work until they dont, the question is what behavior you built beyond them

2/ defi is still tiny, build to onboard not to siphon

3/ a protocol that works for one power user and scales to a thousand is a good business - one that needs a thousand to work is not

4/ dont optimize for TVL, optimize for the type of capital that stays when incentives end or incentivize a behavior that leads the user to uncover more value than the incentive is worth and that will persist long after its gone

5/ the best founders I have talked to can tell me exactly who their product fails for
